# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Pipeline

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      pre_build_command:
        description: 'Command to run before the build (e.g., install dependencies)'
        required: false
        default: 'echo "No pre-build command specified"'
        type: string
      build_command:
        description: 'Main build command to execute'
        required: true
        default: 'echo "No build command specified"'
        type: string
      post_build_command:
        description: 'Command to run after the build (e.g., run tests, package artifacts)'
        required: false
        default: 'echo "No post-build command specified"'
        type: string
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for build commands'
        required: false
        default: '.'
        type: string
      node_version:
        description: 'Node.js version to use (leave empty to skip Node.js setup)'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
      python_version:
        description: 'Python version to use (leave empty to skip Python setup)'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
      java_version:
        description: 'Java version to use (leave empty to skip Java setup)'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
      upload_artifacts:
        description: 'Whether to upload build artifacts'
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean
      artifact_path:
        description: 'Path to artifacts to upload (if upload_artifacts is true)'
        required: false
        default: 'build/'
        type: string
      artifact_name:
        description: 'Name for the uploaded artifact'
        required: false
        default: 'build-artifacts'
        type: string
      runner:
        description: 'Runner to use (e.g., ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest)'
        required: false
        default: 'ubuntu-latest'
        type: string

jobs:
  custom-build:
    name: Custom Build
    runs-on: ${{ inputs.runner }}
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: inputs.node_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ inputs.node_version }}

      - name: Setup Python
        if: inputs.python_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ inputs.python_version }}

      - name: Setup Java
        if: inputs.java_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: ${{ inputs.java_version }}
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Display build configuration
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "       Custom Build Configuration"
          echo "============================================"
          echo "Runner:              ${{ inputs.runner }}"
          echo "Working Directory:   ${{ inputs.working_directory }}"
          echo "Node.js Version:     ${{ inputs.node_version || 'Not configured' }}"
          echo "Python Version:      ${{ inputs.python_version || 'Not configured' }}"
          echo "Java Version:        ${{ inputs.java_version || 'Not configured' }}"
          echo "Upload Artifacts:    ${{ inputs.upload_artifacts }}"
          echo "============================================"
          echo "Pre-build Command:   ${{ inputs.pre_build_command }}"
          echo "Build Command:       ${{ inputs.build_command }}"
          echo "Post-build Command:  ${{ inputs.post_build_command }}"
          echo "============================================"

      - name: Run pre-build command
        run: ${{ inputs.pre_build_command }}

      - name: Run build command
        run: ${{ inputs.build_command }}

      - name: Run post-build command
        run: ${{ inputs.post_build_command }}

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: inputs.upload_artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ inputs.artifact_name }}
          path: ${{ inputs.artifact_path }}
          retention-days: 14
          if-no-files-found: warn

      - name: Build summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "## Build Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Setting | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "|---------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Runner | \`${{ inputs.runner }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Working Directory | \`${{ inputs.working_directory }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Node.js Version | \`${{ inputs.node_version || 'N/A' }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Python Version | \`${{ inputs.python_version || 'N/A' }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Java Version | \`${{ inputs.java_version || 'N/A' }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Artifacts Uploaded | \`${{ inputs.upload_artifacts }}\` |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "### Commands Executed" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Pre-build:** \`${{ inputs.pre_build_command }}\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Build:** \`${{ inputs.build_command }}\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Post-build:** \`${{ inputs.post_build_command }}\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
